title: Content source frontmatter
description: Frontmatter contract for content/src/**/*.md (writing/product/patterns guidance). Authored by the content team; governs nav + related-component wiring. README.md/AUTHORING.md are exempt (no frontmatter).

nav_order.description: Sort position in the docs navigation (lower = earlier).

relatedComponents.description: Component registry slugs this content relates to; drives graph edges + guideline fan-out.

nav_exclude.description: Exclude this page from the docs navigation.

search_exclude.description: Exclude this page from docs search.

wordsToAvoid.description: Banned-word lint rules — present only on content/src/writing/words-to-avoid.md. Each row carries the words to flag, the human reason, and a do/don't example. Derived verbatim into content/dist/words-to-avoid.json (the plugin copy-linter) and re-rendered into content/dist/global.md.

avoid.description: Lowercased words/phrases to flag in UI copy (empty array = advisory-only row).

reason.description: Human-readable rationale shown in the guidance table.
examples: Never say "Please" or "Sorry" — they are unnecessary.

example.description: A do/don't copy pair illustrating the rule.
